prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约286名（2021）、331名（2022）、270名（2023）、215名（2024）、1763名（2025）。2021–2024年位次在215–331之间窄幅波动，整体处于全省顶尖水平；2025年因河南省首次实施新高考（物理类），招生计划从3人骤增至35人，最低位次大幅后移至1763名，降幅显著；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年4人、2022年3人、2023年3人、2024年3人、2025年35人（物理类）、2026年40人（物理类）。2025年因新高考改革大幅扩招，2026年继续扩招5人（+14.3%），扩招趋势延续，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；依托上海交通大学（软科中国大学主榜第4名），医学院为国内顶尖医学院之一，临床医学学科评估A+，办学层次极高，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期内上海交通大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端相关舆情（撤稿数量较多），但医学院作为独立招生代码受影响相对有限；抖音热度为较热（总排名第42），短视频平台曝光量中等；2021年曾出现河南投档线在华五中偏低的情况，但近年已恢复；临床医学A+、口腔医学A+、生物学A+、生物医学工程A、护理学A-等，医学学科实力位居全国前列；招生专业以临床医学（本博连读、五年制、眼视光方向）为核心，学科评估等级极高，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度2024年为推荐，虽较2023年小幅降温但仍属偏热；口腔医学为推荐，医学类专业整体报考热度稳定。河南省2026年高考总考生约120万人，较2025年（约90.7万）大幅增长约32%，物理类考生估算约73.4万（较2025年55.5万增长约32%），考生规模激增使竞争显著加剧；上海交通大学医学院在河南省招生占比从2021年的1.27%升至2025年的7.14%（35人/490人），河南已成为该校省外重要生源地；学校位于上海，地域吸引力强，对中部省份考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年继续扩招14.3%的缓解效应、河南省考生规模激增约32%带来的竞争加剧、医学类专业热度稳定偏热、学校顶尖层次持续吸引高分考生等因素，扩招与考生增加形成对冲，但考生增幅远超扩招幅度，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年1763名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约1944名，区间1711–2177名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（五年制）
- 临床医学（眼视光方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（卫生事业管理方向）
- 预防医学（含双学士学位项目）
- 医学技术类（含医学检验技术、食品卫生与营养学、医学影像技术、听力与言语康复学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1711–2177名内，建议以二档临床医学（五年制）为主攻方向、一档临床医学（本博连读）为冲刺目标、三档预防医学及医学技术类为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（≤1711名）可重点冲刺一档本博连读专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 286 (2021), 331 (2022), 270 (2023), 215 (2024), and 1763 (2025). From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly between 215 and 331, remaining at the top level of the province; in 2025, due to Henan Province implementing the new college entrance examination for the first time (Physics Category), the enrollment plan surged from 3 to 35 students, causing the minimum ranking to drop significantly to 1763. The university's enrollment plan in Henan for science/physics categories: 4 students in 2021, 3 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 3 in 2024, 35 in 2025 (Physics Category), and 40 in 2026 (Physics Category). The substantial expansion in 2025 due to the new exam reform, with an additional 5 students (+14.3%) in 2026, indicates a continuing expansion trend, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (ranked 4th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking), the School of Medicine is one of the top medical schools in China, with clinical medicine rated A+, indicating an extremely high level of education, which continues to strongly attract high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Shanghai Jiao Tong University's reputation is slightly negative, mainly due to academic misconduct-related public opinion (a relatively high number of retractions), but the School of Medicine, as an independent admission code, is relatively less affected. Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 42nd overall), with moderate exposure on short video platforms. In 2021, there was a case of low admission scores in Henan among the C9 League, but it has recovered in recent years. Clinical medicine A+, stomatology A+, biology A+, biomedical engineering A, nursing A-, etc., with medical disciplines ranking among the top in the country. The enrollment majors are centered on clinical medicine (MD-PhD combined, five-year program, and ophthalmology direction), with extremely high discipline evaluation levels, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of clinical medicine in 2024 is recommended, though slightly cooler than 2023, it remains relatively hot; stomatology is recommended, and the overall popularity of medical majors is stable. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (approximately 907,000), with an estimated 734,000 Physics Category candidates (up about 32% from 555,000 in 2025), leading to intensified competition due to the surge in candidate numbers. The proportion of Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine's enrollment in Henan increased from 1.27% in 2021 to 7.14% in 2025 (35 out of 490 students), making Henan an important source of students outside the province. Located in Shanghai, the university has strong regional appeal, continuously attracting candidates from central provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in rankings in the first year of the new exam in 2025 as a baseline, the mitigating effect of a 14.3% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 32% surge in candidate numbers in Henan Province, the stable and relatively high popularity of medical majors, and the continuous attraction of top-tier high-scoring candidates to the university's elite level, the expansion and candidate increase offset each other, but the candidate growth far exceeds the expansion rate. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to drop slightly from the 2025 ranking of 1763. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1944, with a range of 1711 to 2177.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (MD-PhD Combined Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Ophthalmology Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Preventive Medicine (Health Management Direction)
- Preventive Medicine (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Medical Technology Category (Including Medical Laboratory Technology, Food Hygiene and Nutrition, Medical Imaging Technology, Hearing and Speech Rehabilitation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1711–2177, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) as the main target, aim for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine (MD-PhD Combined Program) as a stretch goal, and use Tier 3 Preventive Medicine and Medical Technology Category as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (≤1711), prioritize aiming for Tier 1 MD-PhD Combined Program majors.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
